tasks.notes: REVIEW FAIL (uat): US-004 Task Decomposition — Expected: gwrk tasks generate must be idempotent and preserve existing task status (e.g., 'completed'). Actual: Every run resets all task statuses to 'open'. Fix: Load existing tasks.json if it exists and merge status/completedAt for existing tasks.
